DTS5 the new look has low to mid nose entry & tail rocker, deep single concave, low soft rail. DTS model is a wide tail rounded square fish style board.
models.rocker_notes: DTS5 the new look has low to mid nose entry & tail rocker, deep single concave, low soft rail.
models.tail_notes: DTS5 the new look has low to mid nose entry & tail rocker, deep single concave, low soft rail. DTS model is a wide tail rounded square fish style board.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Early Bird designed as smaller wave all-rounder. Strong rocker, concave & vee & plan-shape generate easy speed to draw out turns or snap tight in the pocket.
models.rocker_notes: Strong rocker, concave & vee & plan-shape generate easy speed to draw out turns or snap tight in the pocket.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Face Dancer holds steep take-off, release quickly from bottom-turn. Surf Face Dancer as Thruster, lively, slightly more predictable in 3-6' surf.
Quad option stretched out Face Dancer with moderate rocker for bigger stronger surf at 3 to 6 feet. Low soft rail, shallower single concave to vee at the tail.
models.rocker_notes: Quad option stretched out Face Dancer with moderate rocker for bigger stronger surf at 3 to 6 feet. Low soft rail, shallower single concave to vee at the tail.
models.tail_notes: Low soft rail, shallower single concave to vee at the tail.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Small wave all-rounder, increased volume in rail, nose, tail. Designed for the feel pros experience with manageable ratio paddling power to surfboard size....
models.rocker_notes: Small wave all-rounder, increased volume in rail, nose, tail.
models.tail_notes: Small wave all-rounder, increased volume in rail, nose, tail.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Designed all-round surfing, retro style performance shape 2-5' surf. Rounder shape area nose, widish roundtail, good glide-on paddle speed, easy take-off.
models.tail_notes: Rounder shape area nose, widish roundtail, good glide-on paddle speed, easy take-off.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Ultimate wave catching assistance.Good speed & glide across wave. Roundtail vee & tailrocker helps cutback short turn arc, rebound off-the-top in smaller waves.
models.rocker_notes: Roundtail vee & tailrocker helps cutback short turn arc, rebound off-the-top in smaller waves.
models.tail_notes: Roundtail vee & tailrocker helps cutback short turn arc, rebound off-the-top in smaller waves.

models.manufacturer_evidence: This is not a chunky fat fish and you don't need a thick nose on a round nose plan-shape board so the thinner feel all over enhances the performance factor...
High performance, dependable board at the edge of performance parameters. Fast & loose but predictable. Rounded Squaretail, single-double concave.
models.tail_notes: Rounded Squaretail, single-double concave.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Quad & Thruster option swallowtail fish surfboard waves up to 4 feet. Spudnick can surf up a bit as a Thruster. Area pointy nose, performance in rip-able waves.
models.tail_notes: Quad & Thruster option swallowtail fish surfboard waves up to 4 feet.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Quad option roundtail Thruster, short fat summer board blend of performance. Surf as quad to cut shorter sharper arcs on wave face, Thruster for carve feel.
models.tail_notes: Quad option roundtail Thruster, short fat summer board blend of performance.

models.manufacturer_evidence: All-rounder as semi step-up, or good wave board. Medium rocker slightly more curve through middle feels good in hollow waves.
models.rocker_notes: Medium rocker slightly more curve through middle feels good in hollow waves.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Tight & Tiny - relatively narrow board with increased nose & tail area means the T&T plan shape will not be too curvy and will hold in well in a bit of power.
models.tail_notes: Tight & Tiny - relatively narrow board with increased nose & tail area means the T&T plan shape will not be too curvy and will hold in well in a bit of power.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Three-Peat gives feel of 80's incorporating a blend of right now. Blended 80′s and 90′s style rails, flatter deck & original Thruster plan-shape, single flyer.
models.rocker_notes: Blended 80′s and 90′s style rails, flatter deck & original Thruster plan-shape, single flyer.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Normal length but wider nose on a wider board with a normal width rounded square. Single to double concave to vee at tail. Low soft modern rail and deck line.
models.rocker_notes: Low soft modern rail and deck line.
models.tail_notes: Single to double concave to vee at tail.

models.manufacturer_evidence: Inception Simon surfboard model surfed by just about every Surfing World Champion from Shaun Tomson to Kelly Slater. All-round small wave high performance.
